in the Vision Plus 8th #8BobTreasureHunt Raffle” font_container=”tag:h2|text_align:center”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1738138828955{padding-top: 10px !important;}”]We turned 8 on 26th December 2024, and we’re turning it into a month-long celebration of YOU, our valued customers. Throughout January 2025, we’ll be hosting exciting contests, giveaways, and sharing inspiring stories of triumph and resilience. But that’s not all – we’re also culminating the celebration with a grand Raffle on the 31st of January where one lucky winner will buy a complete home makeover package for the symbolic price of KES 8![/vc_column_text][image_with_animation image_url=”41082″ image_size=”full” animation_type=”entrance” animation=”None” animation_movement_type=”transform_y” hover_animation=”none” alignment=”” tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”Terms and Conditions”][vc_column_text]Eligibility: This treasure hunt is open exclusively to individuals who are 18 years of age or older and are legal residents of Kenya.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Agreement to Terms: By participating in this treasure hunt, participants acknowledge and agree to be fully bound by these terms and conditions.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Employee and Contractor Exclusion: Employees, contractors, and close relatives of Vision Plus are ineligible to participate in the treasure hunt.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Winner Verification: The participant who finds the treasure will be subject to a verification process by Vision Plus to confirm adherence to these terms and conditions and ensure the legitimacy of the find.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Contact Information: The treasure finder must provide accurate and valid contact information during checkout. Failure to respond to Vision Plus’s communication attempts within two attempts will void the find, and a new treasure hunt will be initiated.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Prize Eligibility: Only the first individual whose name is randomly selected through the raffle will be eligible to buy the treasure for Kes 8.
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Prohibited Conduct: The use of bots, scripts, or any other automated methods to participate in the treasure hunt is strictly prohibited. Any finds achieved through such means will be invalidated.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Raffle Duration: The raffle will be conducted exclusively on January 31st, 2025.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Submission Deadline: Any submissions made after midnight on 30th January 2025 will not be viable for the raffle.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Disqualification of Prior Winners:Participants who have successfully claimed a treasure in a previous round of the treasure hunt shall be ineligible to participate in subsequent rounds. Any attempt to circumvent this provision shall result in immediate disqualification and potential forfeiture of any claimed or potential prizes.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Modification and Termination: Vision Plus reserves the right to modify or terminate the treasure hunt at its discretion, at any time, and for any reason, including but not limited to unforeseen circumstances.[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left”
